steps.title: Identify the required meaning
steps.content: The book “has earned a lot of praise,” and “In fact” signals that the next statement reinforces this achievement. The blank needs a verb meaning to obtain or receive recognition.

steps.title: Apply the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”Received” expresses obtaining an award, the logical continuation of earning praise. The other three verbs—blamed, forgot, and guessed—don't describe how recognition is given or are incompatible with the achievement context. That matches choice C — C is correct.
